name: New Momentum Corp.
business: New Momentum Corp. operates an online ticketing platform named Gagfare.com that provides a book-now-pay-later option for flight ticket reservations. The platform allows travelers to search, book, and issue flight tickets from over 500 airlines globally. The platform is currently undergoing an upgrade estimated to be completed by the end of 2025.

exposures.sentence: Nemo Holding has developed and operates an online ticketing platform named Gagfare.com, which provides a ticketing system for individuals and agencies to search, book and issue flight tickets and other services.

With a unique and first time ever book-now-pay-later solution provided by Gagfare, travelers can now pay only $2.00 to secure up to nine flight seats, well in advance in schedule, on their desired flight.

catalysts.sentence: Platform is undergoing upgrade and estimated to be done by end of 2025.
